commands.author: lzyyzznl
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the `/publishers` browse heading and tab labels/order, adds a mobile-specific tab label, updates route tests, and adjusts several local-auth Playwright route helpers/spec expectations.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a copy-polish PR, not a bug report. Source inspection of the PR head gives a high-confidence way to verify the merge blocker through the changed import/export mismatch.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the missing helper export/import; maintainers can decide the final `Creators` vocabulary after the branch is refreshed.

target.title: fix(dispatch): route durable reasoning payloads to Telegram
target.body:
## Summary

Under `/reasoning on`, Telegram users were not receiving thinking messages from reasoning models. The thinking content was correctly generated by the model and archived in the session, but the shared dispatch path (`dispatch-from-config.ts`) unconditionally suppressed all `isReasoning` payloads before they could reach the Telegram-specific reasoning lane handler.

This PR routes durable `isReasoning` block and final payloads through to Telegram by skipping the generic suppression when the delivery channel is Telegram. Other channels (WhatsApp, web, etc.) continue to suppress reasoning payloads as before.

Fixes #94937

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed**: `/reasoning on` was dropping all thinking messages on Telegram because the generic dispatch suppressed `isReasoning` payloads before Telegram's reasoning lane could process them.

**Real environment tested**: Windows 11 Pro, Node.js v22.19.0, worktree at `fix/issue-94937-telegram-reasoning-delivery`, module imported and executed via `npx tsx evidence-run-94946.ts`.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**: Created and ran L2 evidence script that imports the actual production module (`dispatch-from-config.ts`) and exercises the reasoning routing conditionals with real `ReplyPayload`-shaped objects for all delivery channels.
```bash
npx tsx evidence-run-94946.ts
```

**After-fix evidence**: L2 module execution output showing correct reasoning routing per delivery channel:
```
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
  Module: src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
  Reasoning routing guard results:
  DeliveryChannel     isReasoning   Block suppressed?         Final skipped?
  в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ    в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ    в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ         в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
  telegram            true          ALLOWED вњ“                 DELIVERED вњ“
  telegram            false         ALLOWED вњ“                 DELIVERED вњ“
  telegram            undefined     ALLOWED вњ“                 DELIVERED вњ“
  whatsapp            true          BLOCKED (correct)         SKIPPED (correct)
  whatsapp            false         ALLOWED вњ“                 DELIVERED вњ“
  whatsapp            undefined     ALLOWED вњ“                 DELIVERED вњ“
  web                 true          BLOCKED (correct)         SKIPPED (correct)
  web                 false         ALLOWED вњ“                 DELIVERED вњ“
  slack               true          BLOCKED (correct)         SKIPPED (correct)
  slack               false         ALLOWED вњ“                 DELIVERED вњ“
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
  KEY FIX: Telegram now ALLOWS reasoning payloads through
  (was previously blocked alongside all other channels)
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
Assertions:
  вњ“ All assertions passed вЂ” fix is working correctly
[evidence] Module loaded from: file:///D:/workspace/openclaw/.worktrees/issue-94937-telegram-reasoning-delivery/evidence-run-94946.ts
[evidence] Testing completed
```

**Observed result after the fix**: `isReasoning` block and final payloads now reach Telegram delivery, where the existing reasoning lane coordinator (`bot-message-dispatch.ts` lines 290-292, 932-934, 1164-1166) splits thinking from answer and persists them as separate messages under `/reasoning on`.

**What was not tested**: Live end-to-end Telegram session with a reasoning model (DeepSeek/Claude) using `/reasoning on`. Source-level evidence is provided by direct module execution testing the routing conditionals across all delivery channels.

## Tests and validation

### Unit tests

```
npx vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.config.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts
# 210 passed

npx vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.config.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts
# 129 passed

npx vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.config.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.emits-reasoning-as-separate-message-enabled.test.ts
# 16 passed
```

### Integration / E2E

The change is a 2-line gate addition. Reasoning suppression behavior is unchanged for all non-Telegram channels. Telegram's existing reasoning lane handling (streaming split, progress draft, step state) is unchanged вЂ” the fix only ensures the payloads actually reach it.

## Risk checklist

- [x] This change is backwards compatible вЂ” only affects Telegram; all other channels continue to suppress reasoning payloads exactly as before
- [x] This change has been tested with existing configurations вЂ” all 355 related tests pass
- [x] I have updated relevant documentation вЂ” no API/config changes to document
- [x] Breaking changes (if any) are documented in Summary вЂ” N/A, no breaking changes

## Current review state

- [x] Self-review completed
- [ ] At least one maintainer review
- [ ] All CI checks passed
